nasb.text: Ascribe to the Lord the glory of His name; Bring an offering and come into His courts.

esv.text: Ascribe to the Lord  the glory due his name; bring an offering, and come into his courts!

cnv.text: 要把耶和華的名當得的榮耀歸給他， 帶著禮物進入他的院子。

ccb.text: 要把耶和华当得的荣耀归给祂， 要带着祭物到祂的院宇敬拜祂。

csbs.text: 当把耶和华名的荣耀归给他， 当举起供物，进入他的院宇。
